name: Costco Wholesale Corporation
description: Costco Wholesale Corporation operates an international chain of membership warehouses, mainly under the 'Costco Wholesale' name, that carry quality, brand-name merchandise at substantially lower prices than are typically found at conventional wholesale or retail sources. The warehouses are designed to help small-to-medium-sized businesses reduce costs in purchasing for resale and for everyday business use. Individuals may also purchase for their personal needs. Costco offers a wide selection of merchandise, plus the convenience of specialty departments and exclusive member services.
